# ctyun_express_connect (Resource)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10026763/10038220



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

resource "ctyun_express_connect" "example" {
  name        = "express_connect_dependence"
  description = "云间高速example专用"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) 名称 支持更新

### Optional

- `description` (String) 描述信息 支持更新
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID，如果不填则默认使用provider ctyun中的region_id或环境变量中的CTYUN_REGION_ID

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) 创建时间，为UTC格式
- `id` (String) 云间高速实例ID
- `status` (Number) 运行状态，取值范围: 0:创建中 2:运行中 18:删除中 21:设置中 22:更新带宽中 24:更新中
